{{Infobox character
| name = Lindon
| aliases = Shi Lindon, Wei Shi Lindon
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Kelsa]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Foundation technique]], [[scripts]], [[Empty Palm]], [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]], [[White Fox boundary formation|White Fox boundary]], [[Heart of Twin Stars]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|, [[Path of Twin Stars]], [[Forging]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, [[Soulsmithing]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi Lindon the Unsouled, champion of the Foundation tournament}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|, founder of a Path}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, [[Underlord]], [[Blackflame]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Wei clan]], family Shi, [[Heaven’s Glory School|Heaven's Glory School]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, [[Arelius family]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|, [[Skysworn]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[Twin Star Sect]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Reaper Division]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[disciple]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|, [[Soulsmith|soulsmith]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|, apprentice Soulsmith}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Sage|sage]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, swordsman}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sacred Valley]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Moongrave]], [[Ninecloud Court]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Lindon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Shi Lindon, also known as Lindon or [[Lindon Arelius]], is a powerful [[sacred artist]] who originated from the [[Wei clan]] in [[Sacred Valley]]. Initially identified as an [[Unsouled]] with a wooden badge and limited advancement, he eventually rose through the ranks of power, progressing from an [[Iron]] to a [[Jade]], [[Lowgold]], and eventually reaching the status of a [[Sage]]. His journey took him from his homeland to the [[Blackflame Empire]], where he became an adopted member of the [[Arelius family]]. Throughout his development, Lindon has mastered various forms of [[madra]], including [[Blackflame]] and hunger-based power associated with the [[Void Icon]] and the [[Slumbering Wraith]]. He is known for his expertise in [[Soulsmithing]], creating intricate constructs like [[spiders]] and spiritual ores, and has utilized specialized techniques such as the [[Hollow Domain]]. Lindon's role has evolved from a clan member to a significant figure capable of influencing major conflicts, commanding authority over locations like the [[labyrinth]], and interacting with high-level entities such as [[Monarchs]], Underlords, and [[Abidan]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi Lindon is an eight-year-old [[Unsouled]] of the [[Wei clan]] and the [[Shi family]] who possesses [[pure madra]] visualized as blue-white light. While recovering from a broken arm sustained while searching for ancestral fruit, he manages his stamina by cycling his [[madra]] and uses [[scripts]] to suppress pain or draw power from [[Remnants]]. After redoubling his training through morning sessions with [[Kelsa]], afternoon studies in the archives, and evening cycling, he becomes the champion of the [[Foundation tournament]] using the [[Empty Palm]] technique. Following a dream in which he dies during a [[Dreadgod]] attack, he receives a glass bead token containing a blue candle-flame and becomes a disciple of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School. As a [[Foundation stage]] [[sacred artist]], he utilizes various tools including a wooden ward key, boundary flags, and an ancestral orus fruit to activate the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]. To further his abilities, he employs the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] technique to split his core into two dim, blue-white stars.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">51</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is a member of the [[Wei clan]] and the family Shi.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1">''Unsouled'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]'s full name is Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Foundation technique]] learned as a child to cycle his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] can activate [[scripts]] using his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon's madra]] is visualized as a blue-white light moving through his body like veins.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] can use [[scripts]] to draw in a [[Remnant]] so that the spirit's own [[madra]] powers the script.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] has a numb arm in a sling.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] was searching for an ancestral fruit on behalf of his mother.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] has lightning in his stomach.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] has failed the testing bowl seventeen times.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is tasked with feeding [[Elder Whisper]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] can cycle his [[madra]] to prevent exhaustion and restore stamina.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] carries a bucket of [[jade]]-scaled river carp to feed [[Elder Whisper]] twice daily.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] has a broken arm.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is using a pain-suppressing script left by his mother.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is digesting a spirit-fruit.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] proposed a duel with specific terms: each party takes one strike without defense or resistance, and the first to lose footing is defeated.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Shi [[Lindon]] is an [[Unsouled]] who has shown abilities beyond his level of advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] redoubled his training after his broken arm was removed from its sling.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] intends to find his own way in the [[sacred arts]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] spends his mornings training with [[Kelsa]] in the [[Shi family]] courtyard.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] studies technique manuals in the archive during the afternoons.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] cycles in the evenings.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is the champion of the [[Foundation tournament]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Empty Palm]] technique.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is an [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is a [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is also known as Wei Shi [[Lindon]] the [[Unsouled]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] dies at the end of his dream.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]'s [[fate]] included dying in a [[Dreadgod]] attack.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is referred to by the celestial messenger as Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is referred to as Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] receives a glass bead token containing a blue candle-flame.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a disciple of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is at the [[Foundation stage]] of advancement.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c13">''Unsouled'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] possesses [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] won a contest against [[Kazan Ma Deret]] by virtue of incapacitation.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is a disciple of the [[Heaven's Glory]] School.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] possesses a boundary formation of his own consisting of purple banners.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17">''Unsouled'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] uses a wooden ward key.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] carries boundary flags and [[Suriel's warm marble]] in his pack.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]]'s clothes are white disciple's clothes.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] asks [[Yerin]] if she can keep him alive.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c18">''Unsouled'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon's body]] is not yet at the [[Iron stage]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[halfsilver]] dagger.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] used an ancestral orus fruit to activate the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] and the [[White Fox]] boundary.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] cycling technique to split his core into two.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|After splitting his core, [[Lindon]] has two dim balls of light inside him like blue-white stars.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] is an eight-year-old boy.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] to direct [[madra]] into one core while keeping the other closed.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Wei Shi Lindon is a member of his clan who successfully advanced to the [[Copper stage]] by splitting his core into two fist-sized parts to found the [[Path of Twin Stars]]. While traveling on a cloud with [[Yerin]], he possesses a [[parasite ring]] and dim blue-white madra that is essentially all water. After being released from the [[Sandvipers]], he becomes a newly adopted [[Fisher]] working for [[Fisher Gesha]], though he is eventually forced into being a prisoner in the mines. Despite suffering from blindness, a cracked rib, and useless legs, he uses his spare [[madra]] to [[Forge]] the [[Sylvan]] and scales to advance his cores. Lindon eventually transitions to the [[Iron stage]], becoming a Bloodforged [[Soulsmith]] with a shattered core. He ultimately devises a weapon to counter [[Jai Long]]'s spear, but he dies of his wounds following their duel.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">73</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a character who has an injured back.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has split his core into two parts to follow the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has two cores.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]]'s cores are the size of his fist.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's madra]] is a dim blue-white light.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] successfully advanced to the [[Copper stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is the founder of a [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is advancing to [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]]'s name for [[Lindon]] is Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Copper]] spirit.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[parasite ring]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a member of his clan.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has a weaker core and another core he can switch to.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is traveling on a cloud with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] stood like a statue to avoid showing pleasure at the humiliation.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] carries a wooden badge etched with the symbol 'empty'.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] has a transparent bead in his pocket made of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a bystander watching the confrontation.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has a [[madra]] deficiency.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses [[pure madra]], twin cores, and a broad frame.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a [[Copper stage]] practitioner who has never been given a [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]]'s sleeping space was located among the rafters in a pile of hay accessible by a creaking ladder.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has been working for [[Fisher Gesha]] for almost two weeks.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's madra]] is essentially all water.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses a red [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is in the process of learning [[Forging]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] visited [[Yerin]] five days after his release from the [[Sandvipers]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has not yet forged his scales.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] was sneaking around the Sandviper camp.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a newly adopted [[Fisher]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is present in the mines.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a prisoner being forced to use mining equipment.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] refers to [[Eithan]] as 'elder brother'.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] split his core himself as a defensive measure.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's madra]] flow is knotted.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Path manual]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] knows [[Lindon]]'s full name is Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] held up the marble and began to cycle while running.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a [[Copper stage]] practitioner.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has split his own core.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is blind.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] was bruised and scraped after a fight.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has a cracked rib.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]]'s legs are swollen and useless.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has been unable to walk for days.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] uses his spare [[madra]] to [[Forge]] the [[Sylvan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon's fortress]] is made of [[Remnant]] pieces like bright blue shells and shimmering green limbs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] uses a spider-construct's claws to cut [[dead matter]] away from [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]]'s weapon is a severed Sandviper stinger with a cloth-wrapped hilt.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is at the peak of [[Copper stage]] in one core.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has raised his second core to [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] Forges scales to advance his core.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is on the verge of advancing to the [[Iron stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]]'s parents are at the [[Iron stage]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is not yet sixteen years old.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] pushed the venom everywhere he hadn't already worked his [[madra]], forcing it into his muscles, his skin, even the very center of his bones.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]]'s screams during the [[Iron transformation]] are deafening.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has successfully transitioned to [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] shouts for others to wait.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18">''Soulsmith'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is an [[Iron stage]] practitioner.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a character.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has a shattered core.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has a Bloodforged body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a subject of probabilistic calculation regarding his future.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a high probability that Wei Shi [[Lindon]] will fill one of his cores with the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a high probability that [[Lindon]] will die after scoring a severe wound on [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|There is a low probability that [[Lindon]] will fail to find a suitable [[Path]] for his [[Path of Twin Stars]] and be executed by the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] devises a weapon specifically designed to counter [[Jai Long]]’s spear.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] dies of his wounds after a duel.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] wears an iron badge around his neck.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] holds the spear of his ancestor.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Eithan]] questions if [[Lindon]] can keep up with his goal.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|While training in [[Soulsmithing]] under [[Fisher Gesha]], Lindon utilized his [[Enforce]] technique and a [[Bloodforged Iron body]] to protect his camp from [[Remnants]] and [[dreadbeasts]]. As an [[Underlord]] following the [[Path of Twin Stars]], he utilized a difficult cycling technique to split his [[madra]] into two half-sized cores. After being locked in the [[Transcendent Ruins]] by [[Eithan]], Lindon was directed toward a specific [[Path]] and successfully cleared the [[Enforcer Trial]] using the [[Burning Cloak]] technique. This process resulted in him possessing a [[Blackflame core]] filled with dangerous, burning madra and eyes resembling a death Remnant. After entering the [[Ruler Trial]] as a [[Jade stage]] practitioner, Lindon eventually left [[Sacred Valley]] for the [[Desolate Wilds]] alongside [[Yerin]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">66</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is training in [[Soulsmithing]] with Gesha.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] possesses a spirit.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is a student of [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] can use the [[Enforce]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] [[scripts]] his camp against [[Remnants]] and [[dreadbeasts]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is of the [[Iron stage]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] brought down the [[Sandviper heir]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a [[Bloodforged Iron body]] that heals his fatigue.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] cycles his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] carries a warm glass marble in his pocket.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s cores combined add up to a normal [[Iron]] [[sacred artist]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has two cores, one [[Copper]] and one [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is practicing a cycling technique that causes him to feel like he is choking and dying.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[Path of Twin Stars]] breaks one normal-sized core into two smaller cores.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has two half-sized cores filled with [[Iron]]-quality [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] uses a short-bladed knife.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a glass ball with a steady blue flame in his pocket.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has seen visions of the greatest people on the planet.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] was raised to believe [[dragons]] were myths.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is interested in the [[Path of the Broken Star]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has encountered [[Elder Whisper]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] can feel [[Orthos]]'s presence even with his eyes shut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|One of [[Lindon]]'s cores is a ball of black flames shot through with red.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has been learning to cycle a new [[Path]] for three days.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] was acclimating to the [[aura]] in a side chamber of [[Underground Chamber Number Three]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] carries a black iron medallion showing a hammer.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] was locked in the [[Transcendent Ruins]] by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s spirit has a weight and gravity that no [[Iron]] can fake.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon's core]] is packed with burning, dangerous [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] directed [[Lindon]] to a specific [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a black-and-red core.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is a character who uses the [[Burning Cloak]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Eithan]] intends to honor his word once [[Lindon]] surrenders.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] spoke into the dirt.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Burning Cloak]] technique during the [[Enforcer Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has been training in a damp cave.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] can keep the [[Burning Cloak]] active for twenty minutes if he is not cut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] uses a cycling technique taught by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] possesses a smoky gray crystal.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame madra]] is ready to push him forward.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has cleared the [[Enforcer Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s path is suitable for a heron to kill a lion.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon's madra]] is weak.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a contract with [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a [[sword]] artist.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] knelt before the [[Ruler Trial]]’s tablet.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] can take hits from [[Blackflame madra]] without dissolving.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has [[Twin Stars]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] is a character who enters the [[Ruler Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a [[Jade stage]] practitioner.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] could feel the pain of venom working through [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon's core]] flared with a dark, bloody light.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] cycled to digest power using a simple breathing technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] used a [[Striker technique]] that caused him to feel dizzy from the strain on his spirit.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] has a [[jade]] badge.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] found [[Eithan]] at the edge of a cliff.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] possesses eyes that resemble a death Remnant, with black surroundings and blood-red rings in the center.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] claims to be on [[Arelius family]] business.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] left [[Sacred Valley]] and entered the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A young [[Underlord]] had found [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]], adopting them.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] has deviated from his primary course.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The tall, broad-shouldered Wei Shi Lindon, a descendant of the [[Arelius family]] and the [[Wei clan]], found himself imprisoned in a hundred-yard square room while possessing a glass ball containing a blue flame. During this time, the [[Lowgold]] practitioner of the [[Path of Black Flame]] utilized his [[madra]] to combat cold winds on a gray mountain, though he eventually lost his right arm above the elbow during a duel with [[Jai Long]]. Following this defeat, Lindon recovered to find himself ranked twenty-fourth among Lowgolds and began utilizing a white arm [[construct]] made of pure white madra. While navigating his advancement, he utilized a skeletal [[Remnant]] arm to defend himself and successfully used a technique embedded within it to bind the [[Blood Shadow]]. Despite his progress from being a [[Copper stage]] practitioner only a year prior, Lindon remained focused on his growth and sought to uncover the truth behind [[Eithan]]'s evasions.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">56</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is currently being held in a room that functions as a prison.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] possesses a glass ball that burns with a blue flame in the center.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has enough power to mask.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a tall and broad-shouldered man with short black hair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Wei Shi [[Lindon]]'s eyes are solid black with solid red irises.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is a [[Lowgold]] in the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame madra]] can transform his spirit into a rolling chaos of dark fire.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] used [[Blackflame madra]] to combat the cold wind on a gray mountain.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is in a room that is approximately one hundred yards square.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is a [[Lowgold]] with a second, weaker core.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Lowgold]] pure core.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses a half-formed [[Striker technique]] involving [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has a pure core.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5">''Skysworn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] switched to [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has a pure core and the [[Bloodforged Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s [[Path]] is the [[Path of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is an unconscious character who emitted a thin stream of pale blue from his form.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s arm was cut at the elbow by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has an empty [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has lost his right arm above the elbow.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] possesses the [[Path of Black Flame]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s [[Paths]] would be easier to advance if he had the [[Ancestor's Spear]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] could split his core again to drain a third [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is concerned about falling behind in his advancement if he stays in bed for months.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Eithan]] has taken a significant interest in [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon's madra]] was weak following a fight.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses [[Blackflame]] and the [[Burning Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] has a rough face, tall build, and broad shoulders.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] may have helped the group out of goodwill.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is ranked twenty-fourth among Lowgolds after his duel with [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is sitting side-by-side with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has a new arm that is being turned into a [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] heard a rumor in the city that [[the Emperor]]'s [[Overlord]]-stage weaponry might have been created in the [[Soulsmith foundry]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has a white arm [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s arm [[construct]] is made of pure white madra.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is ranked twenty-fourth among Lowgolds on the combat charts.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] was a [[Copper stage]] practitioner last year.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has black eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is aware that the concept of an [[Unsouled]] was a fabrication created by [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s eyes can transform into a copy of [[Orthos]]' eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] was squirming against manacles beside the [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses his skeletal [[Remnant]] arm to defend himself against metal balls.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] is of the [[Arelius family]] and the [[Wei clan]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] lost a duel to [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16">''Skysworn'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s ears had just healed enough to hear.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant]] arm.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is a skeletal white hand.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Sylvan Riverseed]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] placed his palm on the bloody surface of the parasite and triggered the [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses a technique embedded in his [[Remnant]] arm to bind the [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17">''Skysworn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon's madra]] channels were strained by his use of the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses an [[Empty Palm]] technique to thrust [[pure madra]] from his arm.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] wields a white [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] uses a [[sword]] that has an icy cold property.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]]'s homeland is [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Lindon]] wants to find a way to catch [[Eithan]] in a lie or an evasion.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|As a [[Gold stage]] Wei Shi, Lindon entered a bubble of air through a portal while utilizing the [[Eye of the Deep]]. Despite his madra channels shrieking after forcing out [[dragon]]'s breath, he utilized a [[Burning Cloak]] and managed his nearly empty core as an apprentice [[Soulsmith]]. While struggling with a dying pure core and an uncooperative, inhuman skeletal [[Remnant]] right arm, he practiced various techniques including the [[Striker technique]] and hunger binding. After his channels were strengthened by water from the [[Spirit Well]], he rapidly advanced through the [[Path of Black Flame]] to reach [[Highgold]]. While navigating a [[Monarch]]'s pocket world, he used [[Dream Well water]] and cycled power from the [[Life Well]] to [[Dross]] before eventually advancing to the [[Truegold]] stage. Ultimately, he utilized his [[Soul Cloak]] and reinforced body to climb a cliff while observing [[Harmony]] through his spiritual perception.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">46</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is a [[Gold stage]] practitioner.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is a Wei Shi.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] stepped through the portal into a bubble of air.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has the [[Eye of the Deep]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon's madra]] channels were shrieking in protest after he used them to force out [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] wears a [[Burning Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has a skeletal [[Remnant]] arm made of white madra.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6">''Ghostwater'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon's core]] contains almost nothing.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] compared the elixir to a full night's sleep in a bottle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is an apprentice [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is mentioned by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is alive.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has an inhuman right hand.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] grabbed an old [[Remnant]] body and ran through the trees.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has a dying pure core.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]'s pure core recovers at a snail's pace without help.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] can consume [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10">''Ghostwater'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] can use [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has trained by cycling the energy of the sacred fish.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] can use the [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] can use the hunger binding.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] can use [[Flowing Flame madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] wears a [[gold badge]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]'s right arm was not obeying him.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] observes the blue lights and silver scales near a bubble.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon's madra]] channels were strengthened by the water from the [[Spirit Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c12">''Ghostwater'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is pushing the barriers of [[Lowgold]] due to the [[Spirit Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13">''Ghostwater'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] reached [[Highgold]] on the [[Path of Black Flame]] in two days.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] has a [[Twin Stars manual]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is in the [[Monarch]]'s pocket world.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] advanced to [[Highgold]] in his pure core two weeks after reaching the [[Spirit Well]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] uses a [[void key]] to store items.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Soul Cloak]] technique.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] cycles fire and destruction aura from burning undergrowth.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] uses [[Dream Well water]] to stay awake.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] cycles power from the [[Life Well]] to [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] launched a bolt of [[dragon]]'s fire at [[Harmony]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Suriel]]'s marble.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is approaching the [[Truegold]] stage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is a person [[Yerin]] wants to reach.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]]'s [[Goldsign]] is more dense than before.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] can feel the armor draining [[Harmony]]'s spirit and attention through his spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] used the [[Soul Cloak]] and his reinforced body to climb a cliff.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|While working to master [[Soulsmithing]] and two separate [[Paths]], Lindon utilized [[Ghostwater]] to enhance his body and mental imaging. After using [[Spirit Well water]] to push his pure core toward [[Truegold]], he reached the end of that stage and opened his [[soulspace]]. During this period, Lindon relied heavily on [[Blackflame]] and worked with [[Fisher Gesha]] to repair his jagged, white [[Remnant]] arm using hunger bindings. As a member of the [[Skysworn]] and an apprentice to [[Eithan]] Arelius, he eventually underwent a soulfire transformation that rebuilt his bones and madra channels. This process allowed him to advance to [[Underlord]], resulting in a chalk-white right arm that resembles a human's limb.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">78</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] was cycling [[madra]] to his limb to avoid being lost to the wind.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c2">''Underlord'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[dragon]]'s breath in his left palm.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's body]] was enhanced by meat from [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] used a nail to scratch runes into a door.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] thought about pulling [[Dross]] out of his spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is wearing a tight-fitting cloth suit beneath his armor.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] relies almost entirely on [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has practiced the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] for a year and a half.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is trying to master two [[Paths]] and [[Soulsmithing]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has found a way to enhance his mind.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] possesses ghostwater.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7">''Underlord'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a [[Life Well]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's void key]] contains [[Harmony's axe]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s supply of [[Spirit Well water]] is low.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has taken [[Spirit Well water]] to push his pure core closer to [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame core]] is described as a dark sun hanging on one side of his spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a blue-white core that is an equal to his [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] reached the end of [[Truegold]] and opened his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is sitting in the [[Night Wheel Valley]] forest.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] was not part of the fighting detected by [[Yerin]]'s senses.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The woman asked for Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a white prosthetic arm.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's madra]] channels were strained by the use of many techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] had been strengthened in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s [[soulspace]] is not yet large enough to hold [[Harmony's axe]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is not yet a [[Lord]] but is on the stage.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] sent [[pure madra]] to [[Dross]] at the base of his skull.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's shield]] impact crushed [[Lindon]] into the earth and stones.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] fingernails are tipped like dull claws.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] kindled the [[Burning Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can gather [[Blackflame]] into his hand.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[Harmony's axe]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s lifeline was healthy.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can use unshaped [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant]] replacement for his hand.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is an apprentice of [[Eithan]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is a [[Blackflame]] boy.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] was led by [[Eithan]] to [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant]] arm that is jagged and angular.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is made of white material.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has repaired his [[Remnant]] arm with hunger bindings taken from [[dreadbeasts]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is supposed to be lost when he advances to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] was made together with [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses dream madra.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s concentration is enhanced by [[Dross]]' presence.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is losing its luster.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is cut off from the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is a member of the [[Skysworn]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] possesses a ball of gray soulfire inside him.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has [[soulfire]] in his spirit.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is on the brink of becoming an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] wore modified [[Skysworn armor]] with script lines and a bare white [[Remnant]] limb.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] noted that the [[Seishen King]]'s shield reminded him of [[Kiro]]'s.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] can cycle [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] discovered what [[Dross]] could do for a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses a cannon that can be depleted of its [[essence]] and destroyed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] apologizes to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is holding a launcher construct.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is someone [[Akura Mercy]] sought to save.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses a [[void key]] to pull out an axe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's axe]] has a long bone haft and a red gleaming edge.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is a [[Truegold]] with a white arm that can crack and spray [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant]] limb that is fractured and barely holding together.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is known as the [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has [[Skysworn armor]] with an emergency wind barrier.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses hunger binding in his arm.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[pure madra]] to bind [[Archstone]] fragments.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses ghostwater to assist in mental imaging during forging.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon's Remnant arm]] is repaired into a pure white human arm via [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s advancement involves [[soulfire]] rebuilding his madra channels and strengthening his bones.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[Underlord]] [[madra]] to activate a [[binding]] on his axe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] advanced to [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s right arm is chalk-white and looks like a human's arm.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s [[Skysworn armor]] is cracked all over.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] underwent a soulfire transformation.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] has the spiritual perception of a [[Lord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is mentioned in relation to the tournament.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] is [[Kelsa]]'s brother.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|After being transported to [[Moongrave]] by the [[Sage]], [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]]—an adopted member of the [[Arelius family]] who rose from [[Blackflame territory]]—settled in the [[Ninecloud Court]] as a guest of [[Akura Charity]]. Practicing both an inherited fire and destruction [[Path]] alongside a [[pure madra]] [[Path]], Lindon prepared for the [[Uncrowned]] tournament by requesting various elixirs and pills while training with focused techniques. As a qualified competitor, he worked to lead the white army to victory by aiming to destroy the black base dome or eliminate all black soldiers. During the trials, Lindon utilized his [[Soul Cloak]], [[dragon]]'s breath, hunger binding, and mind-spirit to climb the rankings to tenth place. Throughout the intense combat, he employed various tools including [[Skysworn armor]], [[Akura sacred artist's robes]], and the [[Archstone]] to reinforce his body. Following a battle where he was momentarily killed by Sophara's claws, Lindon eventually claimed an [[Iron Heart]] as his prize, which integrated with his body and allowed him to forge [[Blackflame madra]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">60</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is a person mentioned by [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c1">''Uncrowned'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is sitting in a dungeon.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] was brought to [[Moongrave]] by the [[Sage]]'s transportation.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is a [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] rose from the [[Blackflame territory]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] practices a [[pure madra]] [[Path]] and an inherited fire and destruction [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is being introduced to [[Mercy]]'s peers.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] requested mental enhancement elixirs, madra restoration pills, and a [[parasite ring]] from an [[Akura servant]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is experiencing quiet panic while [[Akura Charity]] examines [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is a guest of [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has explosive constructs stored in his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Skysworn armor]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is practicing focused technique training.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has a gash in his lip.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] lives in [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[pure madra]] to drown spiritual attacks to his core.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is a qualified participant in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] was adopted into the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] holds a [[construct]] that exploded.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is staying in the [[Ninecloud Court]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s breath locked in his chest.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is a competitor in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s objective is to lead the white army to victory by eliminating all black soldiers or destroying the black base dome.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] passed the third and fourth trials without using any new techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s ranking moved up to thirty-first.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has revealed his [[Soul Cloak]], [[dragon]]'s breath, hunger binding, and mind-spirit.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is ranked tenth in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can store items in his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] arrived and shoved [[dragon’s breath]] into a [[Ghost-Blade]]'s chest.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has seen lethal attacks cause victims to dissolve into light.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can use [[Copper sight]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Soul Cloak]] to move with speed and grace.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] adds [[soulfire]] to his [[Empty Palm]] techniques.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has trained at the [[Akura]] family.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Archstone]] to reinforce his arm.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] wears [[Akura sacred artist's robes]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[Little Blue]] for help with his core.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant hand]] that can conduct the [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses hunger binding to weaken attacks.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can gather [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s head was torn off by Sophara's claws.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] reappeared on the beach after a battle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can let the [[Path of Black Flame]] bleed into his eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] wears a halfsilver badge.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] offers to fight the [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] draws on his fire [[Path]] to increase heat tolerance.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses a two-handed [[dragon]]'s breath attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] had to force his body to move like a puppet.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s prize is a heart cast in dark gray metal.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has an [[Iron Heart]] that has integrated with his [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s [[Iron body]] can draw [[pure madra]] from him.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon's shield]] can take a spiritual form.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] was watching [[Yerin]]'s face closely.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses a shield and [[Wavedancer]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is a rival of [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] control to weaken [[sword]]-[[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses a technique from [[Eithan]] to blast [[pure madra]] from his body as spiritual armor.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]]'s pure core was tapped out after his massive [[madra]] attack.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] is described as a [[madra]] monster.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] can [[Forge]] [[Blackflame madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|After being eliminated from the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament due to his [[madra]] being affected by an outside will, Lindon resided in the [[Akura]] family's amethyst spire while training under [[Northstrider]]'s instructions. As a [[Herald]] and companion to [[Eithan]] and [[Yerin]], he led a group against [[Truegold]] cultists using prototype armor that could activate six [[Enforcer techniques]] at once, though the equipment rapidly drained his pure core. During a confrontation with [[Naian Blackflame]], he utilized [[dragon]]'s breath from his palm to fight. While experiencing a vision that rendered his body unresponsive, he attempted to separate his own memories from those of the [[Dreadgod]]. Ultimately, while maintaining a [[pure madra]] field that turned his eyes into blue crystal, Lindon used a [[Forged palm]] of [[pure madra]] to wipe out Sophara's spirit as a black hole swallowed the sky above him.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">85</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon's madra]] was affected by a will not his own.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was eliminated from the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] did not see the [[Dragon King]] leave.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a room in the [[Akura]] family's amethyst spire.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses a scripted card to open his room door.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was a [[Copper]] at the time of his visit from [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] sensed [[blood madra]] within [[Yerin's spirit]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was sitting cross-legged on his bed.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is a companion of [[Eithan]] and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] watched the fight from the [[Akura audience platform]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] practices the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a [[Remnant hand]] with five white fingers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was watching the [[Uncrowned]] matches with [[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] noticed the [[Ninecloud Soul]] skated over the name of his fourth-round opponent.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
