<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has been training as instructed by [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] expressed interest in joining the [[Akura]] operation near the [[Wandering Titan]] to find enemies for training.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] felt embarrassment for being the only one who had not made it.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can activate a [[void key]] to open a closet-sized door in midair.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] had a match against [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] summoned the [[Ninecloud Soul]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has two spirits.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is wearing a blue-white [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is being prepared for battle against enemy Underlords.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses a [[pure madra]] [[veil]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] possesses the Dragon Descends technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has the [[Heart of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is working on a new technique called [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] made it the farthest in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Wavedancer]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] carries a [[construct]] that can receive messages.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses a green [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a blue spirit that perches on his shoulder.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a fever for points.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] works as a [[Soulsmith]] when he cannot find a mission.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses [[Little Blue]] to treat injuries.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is in command of the group.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is part of a team that forced [[Truegold]] cultists away from a tower.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] told [[Dross]] to relay the plan to [[Pride]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses a [[gatestone]] that looks like a lump of sparkling blue chalk.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses [[earth aura]] and [[madra]] to create blades from loose stones.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses a combination of [[Ruler]] and [[Striker techniques]] to create physical and spiritual destruction.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon's armor]] is a functional prototype cobbled together from [[Skysworn armor]] and plates scavenged from the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s prototype armor can activate six full-body [[Enforcer techniques]] at once.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s prototype armor drains his pure core rapidly.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]] empowered by [[Little Blue]] interferes with his prototype armor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] leaped forward.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] did not beat his opponent under tournament conditions.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is interested only in [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was eliminated from the matches.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was crouched on a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] believed [[Mercy]] and [[Min Shuei]] could win.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Charity]] stated that [[Lindon]] will no longer have time for his previous activities.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] fought [[Naian Blackflame]] using [[dragon]]'s breath from his palm.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] can give off a domineering and aggressive impression when holding [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] saw herself across the table from [[Lindon]] at the [[Sundown Pavilion]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is in a dangerous situation.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s safety depends on [[Yerin]] winning.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] rides a black [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] wants permission to drain [[madra]] from the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] did not perform any [[Soulsmithing]] during his rest.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] checked his [[void key]] before preparing to leave.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is experiencing a vision that makes his body unresponsive.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is attempting to separate his memories from the [[Dreadgod]]'s memories.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was standing in a circle of onlookers.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] was with [[Lindon]] for three days.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is a character mentioned in relation to [[Malice]]'s plans.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ruby]] believes [[Lindon]] would hate her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is a character who was protected by Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is observing the battle involving [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] moved to join the gang.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses spiritual perception to sense his surroundings.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] cycled his [[madra]] to its limit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] barreled into Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has trained against Sophara six hundred and forty-four times.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] wished she could have met [[Lindon]]’s heavenly messenger.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s eyes looked like deep blue gems while maintaining the [[pure madra]] field.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] has a white hand.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Enforcer technique]] is stronger than Sophara's.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] used a [[Forged palm]] of [[pure madra]] to wipe out Sophara's spirit.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s eyes transformed into blue crystal.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] stated, "I am the end."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A black hole swallowed the sky directly over [[Lindon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was on the cloudship dock with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] wore a [[wintersteel badge]] with his old [[Unsouled symbol]] on it.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Sage]] and a star of the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, Lindon shares a personal cloud fortress with [[Yerin]]. While maintaining a low profile, he utilizes his [[Remnant hand]] to drain souls and possesses perception that allows him to sense spatial distortions. After landing on a snowy mountainside near [[Mount Samara]], he performs [[Soulsmithing]] operations using his authority as the [[Void Sage]] to manipulate objects. During a confrontation, Lindon manifests an [[Icon]] and brushes against the [[Way]], allowing him to advance to the [[Overlord]] stage. Following this breakthrough, he uses his [[Consume]] technique to drain energy from a [[Titan]], an act that leaves him suffering from aftereffects and physical strain.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">78</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] shares a cloud fortress with [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is accompanied by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is one of the stars of the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can drain souls by tightening his grip with his [[Remnant hand]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4">''Bloodline'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s perception is better-trained than the average [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can sense things [[Yerin]] cannot.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] activated a [[script-circle]] to lift protections.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can feel distortions in space.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] felt responsible for the lost lives of the [[Akura Golds]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a fortress that uses security circles to disperse hostile [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is a character who prefers to keep a low profile.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a personal cloud fortress.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] landed on a snowy mountainside near [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a [[wintersteel badge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is present in the scene.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] did not use the [[Burning Cloak]] to close the distance between him and others.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] asked about the [[Wei clan]] exiles.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] absorbed a [[Striker technique]] into his hunger arm.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a pale right hand.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7">''Bloodline'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has red-and-black eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] wears robes of black, white, and purple.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] wears a shadesilk ribbon with a badge.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon's badge]] has the [[Unsouled symbol]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] gripped the [[Enforcer]] by the neck.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is taller than [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is [[Gold stage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8">''Bloodline'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is a [[Lord]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is a realm beyond [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has eyes made of blue crystal with white circles for irises.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] possesses the spiritual strength of a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is currently at [[Lowgold]] level.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a [[Riverseed]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can use his authority to move objects.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Using his authority causes [[Lindon]] to feel mentally drained.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] attempted to use his authority to change the shape of a mug.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s attempt to change the mug's shape resulted in an identical mug.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] cannot re-open a portal with his [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can use his authority to fill a cup with water.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is performing [[Soulsmithing]] operations.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has mighty friends that Heaven’s Glory respects.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] watches the evacuation from a [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has the authority of the [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can use the [[Consume]] technique.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can use the [[Forger technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can use the [[Fox Mirror technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has [[White Fox]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is a swordsman.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] tells someone to grab [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] used the [[Empty Palm]] technique on the [[Third Elder]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Hollow Domain]] technique.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has a fortress.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses [[madra]] to open his fortress door.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] activated a viewing construct to see the scene behind him.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon's madra]] can become disordered.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] can flow [[pure madra]] through himself to change his eyes to blue.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] had a childhood home that was destroyed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] stopped the cloud's propulsion.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s spirit screamed a warning.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] manifested an [[Icon]] and brushed against the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s future self has one white arm and one arm coated in black scales.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s future self has eyes that are black pools with white circles.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s future self is able to forge a weapon with the power of a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] advances to the [[Overlord]] stage.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] returned functional constructs to his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is perceived as a [[Sage of Twin Stars]] by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] rose on his cloud near the halo of light around [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] caught [[Yerin]]'s arm and pulled her onto his cloud.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s vision blanked out as [[madra]] streamed from [[Yerin]] and [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] used his [[Soul Cloak]] to stay standing.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] opened his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] needs to hit the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] is straining his madra channels.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Consume]] technique to drain energy from the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] was suffering aftereffects from consuming too much of the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]]'s arm was strained and cracked from absorbing the [[Titan]]’s power.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22">''Bloodline'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] has absorbed appetites from the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Whisper]] addressed [[Lindon]] as Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|While attempting to repair [[Dross]] within a half-destroyed [[Tomb]], Lindon sought to study [[Mercy]]'s Book and manage his unhealthy obsession with advancement. Now a twenty-year-old [[Sage]] and [[Overlord]], he utilizes his [[Void Icon]] and [[Hollow Domain]] to manipulate [[madra]] systems, often employing [[soulfire]], [[black dragon's breath]], and specialized [[Soulsmithing]] tools. During a harrowing ordeal in a [[labyrinth]], Lindon faced deadly blades and [[Reigan Shen]] while suffering from a depleted pure core and a broken right arm stitched with [[hunger madra]]. After being remade by the [[Pure Storm Baptism]], he leveraged his [[Void authority]] and a [[Dreadgod arm]] to survive intense combat. Ultimately, Lindon swore an ironclad oath regarding the nature of [[Monarchs]] and the [[Dreadgods]], possessing a sealed right arm and an [[Abidan beacon]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">96</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is attempting to repair [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] marched into the half-destroyed [[Tomb]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] found an alliance of five factions around the emergence of the [[Transcendent Ruins]] a few years ago.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] emits blue-white [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can command the Book to release [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wants to study [[Mercy]]'s Book.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has an unhealthy obsession with advancement.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s eyes change color often.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] sensed the cloudships coming before he saw them.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can see the [[Emperor's cloudship]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] reached [[Sage]] at the [[Overlord]] stage.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] summoned an [[Icon]] when he was an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is a [[Sage]] and an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[Icon]] is the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] taught a spiritual [[Enforcer technique]] called the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] to students.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s right arm was stitched together with [[hunger madra]] from dreadbeast cores.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] addressed [[Eithan]] as [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] seeks warmth from [[Suriel]]'s marble for comfort.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is considered inexperienced in recognizing certain workings of authority.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan's madra]] flooded into [[Lindon]]'s spirit.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] was brought to the second floor of his house on [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] was adopted into the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] was responsible for [[Dross]]'s evolution in the [[Ghostwater facility]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] believes there may be someone else in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is a twenty-year-old [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c11">''Reaper'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has [[Soulsmithing]] tools.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has goldsteel-plated tongs.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a knife.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses spiritual perception to trace [[madra]] systems.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] expected more illusions or clouds but was met with razor-sharp blades or focused beams of heat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s stomach dropped.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] carries enough supplies to act as a refiner and a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is waiting outside a chamber where deadly blades are raging.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can sense that an object is a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can run his [[madra]] through a [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has three compatible [[madra]] types that can be used to take apart the techniques of others.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]] is better at taking apart spiritual energy than [[destruction madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses [[black dragon's breath]] and [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a person [[Suriel]] knows.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] straps three launcher constructs to his left arm.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is enhanced by the [[Soul Cloak]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used a healing construct on [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s pure core had less than a third remaining.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]] was described as a dim candle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] switched to his [[Blackflame core]] when surrounded by water.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] controlled finger-thin beams of [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can leverage his [[Void authority]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used a [[Hollow Spear]] to strike [[Reigan Shen]] through the gut.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can affect portals made from the [[Path of the King’s Key]] with his authority.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is low on [[madra]] and [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is down an arm and his pure core is mostly empty.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] experiences [[hunger aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has been sensing something in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] once dreamed about fighting side-by-side with other [[sacred artists]] as an equal.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s right hand was limp and broken.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is slumped against a panel and looks like he is about to collapse in shame and depression.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can sense the interaction of dream and [[hunger aura]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] advised [[Jai Long]] to follow his fear.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] reached for the case containing [[Subject One]]’s hand.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] reached a consensus regarding the hammer.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses a bag for his [[Soulsmithing]] supplies.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] and [[Dross]] were analyzing the underlying technique of the battle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] was remade by the [[Pure Storm Baptism]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can focus his authority on the [[Dreadgod's hand]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] possesses the [[Dawn Sky Palace]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is using the spear [[Midnight]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is a character who might be able to feel alarm.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] intends to tell a story.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] plans to take an arm as an upgrade.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] salutes the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can read [[Reigan Shen]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has strained the connection to [[Tiberian Arelius]]' space past breaking.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] swears an oath to [[Reigan Shen]] for his safety and freedom.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] within his [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a dead arm.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used the [[Soul Cloak]] to survive an axe attack.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses a shield summoned from his [[void key]] to block lightning.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Empty Palm]] technique to meet acidic liquid.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses bombs, which are explosive single-use constructs.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s hunger arm crumbles completely due to a new level of energy.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is the apprentice of one of [[Ozmanthus]]' last descendants.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has the blessing of the [[Slumbering Wraith]]'s echo.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]]'s [[Void Icon]] resonates with the power of hunger in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] gave his word to [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is in a [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] possesses a white-gray right arm that is more physical than ever.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] can sense the script that controls the surrounding lands of [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] swore an oath not to reveal that [[Monarchs]] prevent the [[Dreadgods]] from ascending.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] expected to be able to write a letter or give a dream tablet but found his oath was ironclad.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] was frozen in terror.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a sealed right arm.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] possesses an [[Abidan beacon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a [[Dreadgod arm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] attempted to [[Consume]] [[Eithan]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] has a hungry arm.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Wei Shi Lindon, a young man with an iron will and [[pure madra]] tinged by hunger, suppresses his white [[Remnant]] arm using scripted cloth. After advancing to the rank of [[Archlord]] and mastering [[Soulsmithing]], he discovers the truth regarding the connection between [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]], an act that violates his oath to [[Akura Malice]]. During a confrontation with the [[Silent King]], Lindon's spirit is enhanced by stolen energy from a [[Dreadgod]], allowing him to consume the [[Silent King]] and reclaim his lost memories. Now a [[Void Sage]] with the strength of a [[Herald]], he utilizes various constructs and the [[Hollow Domain]] to battle, eventually shooting [[Blackflame]] through a [[Dreadgod]]'s head before flying [[Windfall]] north toward the [[Trackless Sea]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">85</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel]] bears a resemblance to Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s right arm is capable of feeding on sensed power.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses a black strip of cloth to suppress his [[Remnant]] arm.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon's madra]] is pure, tinged with [[Subject One]]’s hunger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has an iron will.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is expected to be in [[Everwood]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has the hand of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is not ascending yet because the [[Dreadgods]] are still here.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is creating constructs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is in a conversation with [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] examined [[Lindon]] and found no immediate danger.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses [[life]] and blood constructs to stimulate healing.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5">''Dreadgod'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] stopped [[Dross]] from explaining an image.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] can absorb advancement like he is able to.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has a scripted band of cloth around his upper arm.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] squared his [[madra]] and focused his will.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] are allies to [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] wears an outer robe of the [[Twin Star Sect]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] can [[Consume]] the power of a weapon.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has advanced to the rank of [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] taught [[Yerin]] how to use a basic language [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] experiences vivid nightmares since the rise of [[Dross]]' current personality.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] discovered the truth about [[Dreadgods]] and [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has absorbed the [[Diamond Veins]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is a dead weight that [[Charity]] carried to [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] weighs two and a half times as much as [[Charity]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] violated his oath to [[Malice]] by revealing the connection between [[Monarchs]] and [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s will might be compromised due to mental trauma.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is a hulking young man with a white arm that disturbs spiritual senses.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon's body]] and spirit were recently wracked with pain.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is bound by an oath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is a point of comparison for [[Little Blue]]'s strength.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s hunger arm is held back by scripted cloth.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has authority over manipulating empty spaces.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] realized the [[Silent King]]'s attack was not limited to [[Moongrave]] alone.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is the only student [[Kelsa]] has ever trained.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s [[Soulsmithing]] is considered amazing by [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] used his [[Hollow Domain]] to catch himself on his [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s muscles are suffused with [[life]] and blood essence.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] presented [[Yerin]] with a fully balanced set of treasures sealed in a package.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] left protections for [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] gave instructions to sleep inside scripted walls and activate a particular device if besieged.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s mind-spirit was designed by [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] erupts in a globe of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] possesses white hunger madra.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is fighting against the [[Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s spirit is enhanced because he stole energy from the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is a young [[Void Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has a connection to the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Dreadgod]] assaulted [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] consumed the [[Silent King]] and stole back his own memories.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] stole the dream essence that had been missing from his mind.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s arm was hungry and burning with greed during the consumption.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s spirit reached its limit while swallowing the [[Silent King]]'s power.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] gathered his remaining power into [[dragon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon's madra]] channels burned into his flesh during the power explosion.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s cores condensed like a spirit.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s eyes blazed and froze as if channeling [[Blackflame]] and [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is a boy.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] prepared emergency measures for [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has two white Broken Crowns.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] arrived behind [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has white circles in his eyes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] shot [[Blackflame]] through the [[Dreadgod]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is not skilled enough to create a portal from Serpent’s [[Grave]] all the way to [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] has a chalk-white palm.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] can fly on an [[aura]] of wind and force.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] provided a [[void key]] to [[Orthos]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] believes that reaching the peak of [[Archlord]] brings one close to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] possesses the script of the [[Rune Queen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] possesses the [[Remnant of the Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] can use the [[Void Icon]] to hide himself and others.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|Wei Shi [[Lindon]]'s power can overcome temporary [[aura]] circles.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] felt pride.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] is using a hammer to shape his will in the [[Soulforge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] possesses the physical strength of a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses a full-body [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses a [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses an open [[void key]] to summon constructs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Hollow Domain]] to weaken shadow blades.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]]'s temper can cause the [[Burning Cloak]] to burst involuntarily.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] can release a [[dragon]]'s breath empowered by the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] possesses a cleansing tide of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] picked [[Mercy]] up.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] flew [[Windfall]] north toward the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After completing the construction of [[Ghostwind Hall]], Lindon utilized a repurposed pocket world and various artifacts, including an ancient [[Monarch]]'s scepter and the [[Bow of the Silent King]], to navigate complex battles. He achieved the level of [[Monarch]] in less than a decade by consuming [[Dreadgod]] remnants, a process that left him with black-and-white eyes and a body comparable to a [[Monarch]]. Known as the [[Empty Ghost]] and the [[Sage of Twin Stars]], he wielded immense authority over hunger and used the [[Void Icon]] to manipulate space and time. Following intense conflicts with [[Northstrider]], [[Reigan Shen]], and the [[Weeping Dragon]], Lindon eventually utilized his power to tear open a rift in the [[Way]]. He ultimately ascended from [[Cradle]], marching through a tenuous portal toward [[Suriel]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">153</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] possesses a repurposed pocket world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Void Icon]] to check spatial stability.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses wind [[aura]] to move [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Soulforge]] to create a gateway.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses a signet ring belonging to [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses a scepter belonging to an ancient [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses a robe that belonged to [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses [[Suriel]]’s marble to guide his restorative [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] wears a crown that is the legacy of an ancient [[Monarch]] found in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can easily fix physical damage to a scepter.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can use complex [[Ruler techniques]] effortlessly without a compatible [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is preparing to embed illusion constructs into the floor of the chambers.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] finished the construction of [[Ghostwind Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can [[Consume]] [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is attempting to prevent [[Orthos]] from sensing his frustration.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] wants [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin Arelius]] gone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] stole the core to a pocket world from [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[binding]] burns against [[Lindon]]'s eyes and spiritual senses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses goldsteel tongs to grip the [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] possesses a main [[void key]] around his neck.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can adjust the flow of time.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Bow of the Silent King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has a connection to the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can forge an arrow using the [[binding]] at the heart of his bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses a [[Forger technique]] to release ten thousand identical arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can move himself to the location of an arrow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] recorded the [[Paths]] of Heaven from the bottom of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has burning, inhuman eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has black-and-white [[Dreadgod]] eyes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has a scale that can dissolve.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has consumed things that could have destroyed his soul.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s right arm is twitching.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is using a notebook and quill pen to take notes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] hovered over [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The weight of the [[dragon]]'s charge reminded [[Lindon]] of a physical blow from a [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] prepared a diet for [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has the black [[dragon]] [[Remnants]] locked away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] possesses the power of the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is trading techniques with [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is currently locked in battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] stretched his perception far to the north.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] was concentrating [[madra]] in his left hand.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is using [[Northstrider]]'s [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's body]] was ravaged and his will strained after besting [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is fighting a battle against [[Monarchs]] outside.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has something to help keep [[Orthos]]'s memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is a person [[Mercy]] wishes was with her.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] emerged from the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] wants to be sent to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] was weak and potentially dead.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] was not strong enough to help [[Lindon]] yet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can push through advancement realms with sheer stubbornness.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] sent [[Ziel]] and [[Yerin]] to the battlefield.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c14">''Waybound'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is struggling to stay awake due to the thunder of battle and searing spiritual pain.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] staggered through the [[Nethergate]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's body]] is halfway between a [[Herald]]’s and a [[Dreadgod]]’s, most comparable to a [[Monarch]]’s.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s blood essence provides physical strength.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can read the feelings of others from their spirits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is concerned about the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is fighting the [[Weeping Dragon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] clashed against the [[Weeping Dragon]] with [[Orthos]] and [[Little Blue]] behind him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] met a claw large enough to scoop out villages with black [[dragon’s breath]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] gripped a handful of scales and began to [[Consume]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's madra]] channels run through his physical body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s cores were deep but not endless.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] weakened the [[Dreadgod]]’s blow with an [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] struck the [[Weeping Dragon]] across the belly with [[dragon’s breath]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is the [[Soulsmith]] who assembled the [[Penance arrow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] dropped his bow.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] experienced a complete loss of power and [[aura]] control.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] fell from the sky after losing his power.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] appeared as a dense core of black-and-white power beneath the [[dragon]]'s head.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] forced the Weeping [[Dragon's breath]] up into the sky.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s power flickered out like a vanishing candle-flame.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] gave [[Ziel]], [[Mercy]], and [[Yerin]] a chance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s cores were completely empty and his presence felt weak.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20">''Waybound'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] crafted the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] and its arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used prototype [[Penance arrowheads]] to create three arrows.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is needed to repair the [[Grand Oath Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] was on the verge of death during the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|After consuming one [[Dreadgod]], [[Lindon]] became powerful enough to defend his [[labyrinth]] against multiple [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s right arm is made of white flesh that is pushing into his chest and being transformed by a [[Dreadgod]]'s flesh and blood.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] consumed something from the [[Dreadgod]]'s corpse.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] considered how to use [[Soulsmithing]] to remove damage.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] summoned [[Wavedancer]] from his [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozriel]] hoped to see [[Lindon]] ascend.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] restored the house through a working of the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has taken more [[Dreadgod power]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] views [[Lindon]] as a threat.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] refers to [[Lindon]] as [[Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] was looking for [[Emriss Silentborn]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s eyes are black-and-white.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has more authority over hunger than anyone due to the [[Path of the Hungry Deep]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] carries [[Dross]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] prepared to fight [[Northstrider]] by performing a summoning in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] intended to [[Consume]] the [[Monarch]] upon his arrival.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has already Consumed the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s hand contains the arm of the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is willing to use force against [[Northstrider]] if persuasion fails.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s worst-case scenario is having to kill the [[Monarch]] himself.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is the current owner of his world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is referred to as the [[Empty Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] attempts to enter the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon's body]] is a projection of his mind and spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s power is mostly stolen.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is surrounded by enough power to shake the fabric of the world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] never figured out how to fully repair the [[Array]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s shadow looms in the futures [[Malice]] sees.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has reached the level of [[Monarch]] in less than a decade.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is fighting two [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is consuming energy from a meteor condensed from [[earth aura]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses [[Wavedancer]] to deflect a [[Striker technique]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used a [[Soul Cloak]]-powered punch to meet [[Reigan Shen]]'s pounce.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] took up most of the [[Monarch]]'s attention in previous fights with [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] felt [[Yerin]] advance.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] would have to fight while watching out for [[Yerin]] if she joined the battle.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can steal people's memories.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] consumed a spear from the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is in a battle that involves the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] launched [[dragon]]'s breath at the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] harassed the [[Titan]] with [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] commands the working around the [[Phoenix]]'s talon to break.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is waiting for something and asks how long he must wait.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] felt like absence and chaos due to his connection to the [[Void Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has too much of a connection to hunger.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is currently in [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can release a trickle of his spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is the [[Sage of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can control wind [[aura]] over a courtyard.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s time is limited.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] constructed a meeting-space using the authority of the [[Void Icon]] and [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] pulls weapons out of his [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] opened the [[Soulforge]] in the depths of the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is using the weapon [[Genesis]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Wei Grand Elder]]'s name is Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is a character who can unleash power that solidifies the air.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] proposed a game in the [[arena]] where hits are worth points.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s right hand can punch through [[Markuth]]'s defenses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses storm [[madra]] to blast against [[Markuth]]'s attack.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] summoned a [[flying sword]] from his [[soulspace]] that shines with blue-gold lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has nine swords in formation behind him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is covered in armor made from the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has a cloak made of boiling liquid blood.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s right hand fingers twitched as if possessed by different spirits.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can grab the [[Way]] and tear open a rift.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] is ascending.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] marched into the tenuous portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] ascended from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] asks if they are heading to [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s heart lifted when asking about [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] has been away from [[Yerin]] and the others for almost two years.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] possesses a pair of [[Icons]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] used his spiritual perception to measure the [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|While navigating the [[labyrinth]] with [[Eithan]] as [[Subject One]], Lindon spent time draining a [[Remnant]] dry and crafting a bow from [[Dreadgod]] pieces. After spending two days in the [[Grave]], he fought enemy forces on [[Threshold]] to protect [[Northgate]], eventually falling to earth while his body was remade. Identifying himself as Wei Shi Lindon, the [[Reaper]] representative utilized a [[Hollow Domain]] and his [[Void Icon]] to maintain focus. He later assisted [[Eithan]] in remodeling the [[Grave]]'s interior and joined his vision with [[Yerin]]'s to hammer a new fragment into place, attempting to create a world featuring ghostwater and ocean ecosystems. Finally, Lindon emerged from a [[Way-portal]] alongside [[Yerin]], using his wind [[aura]] to block sound and his spiritual sense to survey the surroundings.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">37</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is in the [[labyrinth]] with [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is referred to as [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is draining a [[Remnant]] dry.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is expected to join [[Mercy]] and [[Fury]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] worked with [[Dreadgod]] pieces to make a bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is someone whom [[Fury]] has befriended.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is mentioned as someone who would have looked for a way to kill the [[Fiend]] and protect people simultaneously.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] has been in the [[Grave]] for two days.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] is from [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]]'s spiritual sense and [[madra]] are in perfect working condition.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] has [[Blackflame]] boiling in his spirit.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is fighting enemy forces on [[Threshold]] while protecting [[Northgate]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] switched to his pure core and released the [[Hollow Domain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Reaper]] identifies himself as Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Wei Shi [[Lindon]] falls to earth while [[Dross]] screams.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
