<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon's body]] has been remade.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Void Icon]] to drive off thoughts.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is a representative of the newly formed [[Reaper Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is a Wei Shi.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelsa]] is the older sister of [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] prepared emergency protections for [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] made weapons for [[Kelsa]] before he ascended.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]]'s [[pure madra]] exploded over the clearing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] offered to take [[Pride]] beyond the world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] has a connection to [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] has set to upgrading the [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] helped [[Eithan]] remodel the interior of the [[Grave]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] is interested in finding the source of [[OTEP]]'s information.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] joined his vision with [[Yerin]]'s to hammer the new fragment into place.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] attempted to create a sea within the newborn world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] envisioned [[Ghostwater]] and vibrant ocean ecosystems when attempting to create the world.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] emerged from a [[Way-portal]] with [[Abidan]] warnings.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] can push himself through space.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] used wind [[aura]] to block sound around him and [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] extended his spiritual sense.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] possesses [[Blackflame]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] uses [[Blackflame]] to burn a man's beard.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Wei Shi Lindon,” the First Elder intones, as Lindon moves forward.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c1" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“This one was in search of an ancestral fruit, on behalf of his mother.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“One strike each, if it pleases you. First, you take one strike from this one without defense or resistance. Then you strike me in turn. The first to lose his footing is defeated.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Today, I’ve shown that my ability reaches beyond my level of advancement.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“I’m pleased to have descended personally, Wei Shi Lindon.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />
